description: You are a Machine Learning Engineer preparing a 100-robot swarm simulation for Reinforcement Learning (RL) training. The world was originally built by a 3D artist for high visual fidelity, but it currently runs too slowly for efficient RL training. Optimize the engine settings for performance by setting the WorldInfo basicTimeStep to 32, the optimalThreadCount to 8, and the FPS to 20. Additionally, disable dynamic shadow rendering by setting the DirectionalLight castShadows property to FALSE. Save the optimized world to /home/ga/Desktop/optimized_training_env.wbt.
